case_title: NATASHA LEE VS. NEST BEDDING INC,

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DEPARTMENT OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS: RESOLUTION DEPT. 1625 N. MARKET BLVD. SUITE S202 SACRAMENTO CA. 95834
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.16 FILED BY LEE, NATASHA AS TO DEFENDANT NEST BEDDING INC, JOE ALEXANDER (OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF NATASHA LEE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NEST BEDDING, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. (ALTHOUGH, PLAINTIFF DID NOT SERVE NEST BEDDING, INC.'S REGISTERED AGENT OF PROCESS). SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS FROM THE CALIFORNIA DEPARMENT OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS RECEIVED BY THE COURT AND REVIEWED BY PLAINTIFF. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, NATASHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEST BEDDING INC, JOE ALEXANDER (OWNER) $2,500.16 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED FEE FOR SERVICE: $21.45
